articles.title: SEC Cannot Call ETH Security and Approve ETH Futures ETF: Analyst
articles.description: Adam Cochran, a partner at Cinneamhain Ventures, has stated in a recent Twitter post that the SEC cannot simultaneously argue that ETH is a new intrinsic “crypto asset security” that is unregistered, and approve an ETH Futures ETF. â€œYou couldn’t have a futures ETF made out of an unregistered security,â€ argued the crypto analyst. articles.title: Hoskinson Fires Back at Critic for Demeaning the Cardano Network
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, Cardano founder, has said that the Hydra protocol on the Cardano mainnet is live and evolving fast. Hoskinson tweeted this while responding to one of the Cardano critics who thinks the Hydra project is unsustainable. Hoskinson noted that besides Hydra, Mithril is also live and functioning. According to Hoskinson, the Cardano team already […]

articles.title: Over $1 billion in crypto market liquidations as Bitcoin hits 2-month low
articles.description: Bitcoin traded at around US$26,800 on Thursday morning in Asia after hitting a two-month low of around US$25,400. Ether fell below US$1,700.
